text: @) Gateway Endpoints T * Provide private access to S3 and DynamoDB e Prefix List added to route table => Gateway Endpoint ¢ Highly Available (HA) across all AZs in a region by default Endpoint policy is used to control what it can access * Regional ... can’t access cross-region services e Prevent Leaky Buckets - S3 Buckets can be set to private only by allowing access ONLY from a gateway endpoint
